title: Clarification on IRDAI (Maintenance of Information by the Regulated Entities and Sharing of information by the Authority) Reg, 2025
full_text:
# [Attachment: а§Жа§Иа§Жа§∞а§°а•Аа§Па§Жа§И (а§µа§ња§®а§ња§ѓа§Ѓа§ња§§ а§Єа§Ва§Єа•На§•а§Ња§Уа§В а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§∞а§Њ а§Єа•Ва§Ъа§®а§Њ а§Ха§Њ а§Еа§®а•Ба§∞а§Ха•На§Ја§£ а§Фа§∞ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§Іа§ња§Ха§∞а§£ а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§∞а§Њ а§Єа•Ва§Ъа§®а§Њ а§Ха•А а§Єа§Ња§Эа•За§¶а§Ња§∞а•А) а§µа§ња§®а§ња§ѓа§Ѓ, 2025 а§™а§∞ а§Єа•На§™а§Ја•На§Яа•Аа§Ха§∞а§£ _ Clarification on IRDAI (Maintenance of Information by the Regulated Entities and Sharing of information by the Authority) Reg, 20.pdf]

вАҐ **пњљl(dlпњљ itiJT пњљпњљпњљ1'1cfi** пњљ **N** пњљ **<u>пњљIпњљ</u>** **~~INSUR~~ ANC** **~~E REGUL~~ ATORY AND** **~~8,8:83¬•~~ ir.lai DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** 

пњљif: пњљ3-fRtm:3fT{;QfP{L11/mпњљ3I пњљ311пњљQfHn;s4;7 /2025 Ref: IRDAI/SUP/CIR/MISC/84/7/2025 **22.07.2025** 

<u>QпњљQ::l</u> **<u>CIRCULAR</u>** 

To all Foreign Reinsurer's branches and Lloyd's India (including its Syndicates and service companies) 

<u>f 3J1 пњљ Al4 rR PQ fa пњљJ"[Rl. f c '& ' mIDTI</u> ¬Ј ~~<u>r</u>~~ <u>c t$41.h RPQJ, 2025 пњљ fecпњљu1</u> **<u>Sub: Clarification on IRDAI (Maintenance of Information by the Regulated Entities and Sharing of information by the Authority) Regulations, 2025</u>**

Jqqc@ f8P J-Jl. пњљ f8P l-l 9 ip-пњљ пњљ пњљif it,пњљпњљпњљ ulTill % W пњљ пњљfiafJ-Jlcpcil cpl пњљllпњљIQ 3f'R cill!qfl пњљ пњљ пњљf:s45<fl 3f'R пњљ <$qP i пњљ пњљ пњљ пњљ пњљ пњљ пњљ. ill _m пњљ_ cfJT пњљarar i-rRa" if M пњљ 1 пњљ пњљ 8пњљYPlcp пњљifпњљ rrD: пњљifffi.9 I пњљ пњљпњљ пњљi.r&m tR ffi1l mill% 

пњљ i-rt пњљ fcpqJ- пњљ % fcr" пњљпњљ 3f'R a'fll&fl пњљ пњљ f 2t5c;_fl '1fR пњљ <$qf.- i пњљ, пњљ3-fRtm:пњљ (f¬∞8P l1la пњљ 3IT пњљ пњљ cfJT пњљarar '1fR пњљ пњљ пњљ cpl fl Iпњљ QI {1), f8 f.-  l-l 2 0 2 5 ip- Jf'tfi::r f.:l-wful пњљпњљ qfq'UA1 cfJT пњљ cR11 I 

By virtue of the powers conferred under Regulation 17 of IRDAI (Maintenance of Information by the Regulated Entities and Sharing of Information by the Authority), Regulations 2025, the following clarification is issued: 

With reference to the proviso to the regulation 9 of the aforesaid regulations, it is clarified that Foreign Reinsurer's branches and Lloyd's India (including its Syndicates and service companies) when they collect such records, those records shall be maintained in India. This is applicable to every record including those maintained in electronic form. 

It is further clarified that FRBs and Lloyd's India (including its Syndicates and Service companies) shall comply with all the provisions stipulated under IRDAI (Maintenance of Information by the Regulated Entities and Sharing of Information by the Authority), Regulations 2025
